description: Machine session state. Provider-neutral: every agent (Claude, Codex, Gemini, or any other) and every human reads this before governed work. Update it at end of session and point active_handoff at the newest handoff.
next_allowed_move: P2-A (Task) done — CVF chain replicated to Task domain (create + status transition), reusing cvf-runtime gates; tasks table mapped with FK/CHECK; SQLite persistence verified. Follow EXECUTION_ROADMAP.md: continue P2-A remaining domains (customer requests, incidents, handovers) using the same pattern as TaskService, OR P2-C (frontend UI for existing verticals). Do NOT open Phase 4 (AI) before Phase 2 core + Phase 3 Refinery gates pass.
commit_discipline: Commit and push to origin main as soon as each roadmap tranche (e.g. P1-A) is complete and gates pass. Do not batch multiple tranches into one commit. Commit message must name the tranche id and verification result.
blocked_work: Claiming SqlLedger is production-verified on PostgreSQL without an actual PostgreSQL round-trip test (SQLite round-trip IS verified; Postgres is the same code path but not yet run live - Docker daemon unavailable in this environment).
Claiming cost/termination are load-bearing before an AI mode beyond NO_AI is wired.
Adding provider-named entrypoint files (CLAUDE.md as content, etc.) - front door must stay provider-neutral (CONTRIBUTING.md).
Batching more than one roadmap tranche into a single commit.

verification_snapshot.operations_ledger: enforced - dual-backend with matching FK/CHECK integrity (SQLite FK enforcement turned on via make_engine; schema-parity test guards tables.py vs migration). SQLite verified end-to-end incl. FK/CHECK rejection; PostgreSQL same code path, not yet run live (no Docker).
